questions.question: Why does Stable Diffusion run its DDPM in a 4x64x64 latent space rather than directly on 3x512x512 pixel images?
questions.question_zh: 为什么 Stable Diffusion 在 4x64x64 的隐空间里跑 DDPM，而不直接在 3x512x512 的像素图上做？
options: Latents are easier to visualise

Training and sampling on 16,384 latent values instead of 786,432 pixels is roughly 48x cheaper; a pretrained VAE handles the image <-> latent conversion, and the diffusion model only has to model the structured latent manifold
Latents are the native output of GPUs
To make inference deterministic
options_zh: latent 更好可视化
在 16,384 个 latent 值上训练和采样，比在 786,432 个像素上便宜约 48 倍；预训练 VAE 负责图像与 latent 之间的转换，diffusion 模型只需建模结构化的 latent 流形
latent 是 GPU 的原生输出
为了让推理变得确定性
questions.explanation: Latent diffusion is the single innovation that made consumer-GPU text-to-image practical. The VAE compresses 48x spatial and channel information. The diffusion model can spend its entire parameter and compute budget modelling the latent manifold, which is the part the user sees after decoding.
questions.explanation_zh: latent diffusion 是让消费级 GPU 上的文生图变得可行的关键创新。VAE 在空间和通道上做了大约 48 倍的压缩，diffusion 模型把全部参数和算力都用来建模 latent 流形，而那正是解码后用户看到的部分。

questions.question: What does classifier-free guidance (CFG) do at inference?
questions.question_zh: 推理时的 classifier-free guidance（CFG）做了什么？
options: Runs two separate models and averages them
Uses one model trained to predict both conditional eps_cond and unconditional eps_uncond noise, then combines them as eps = eps_uncond + w*(eps_cond - eps_uncond) to amplify prompt adherence
Adds a classifier head to the model at test time
Uses a larger scheduler
options_zh: 跑两个独立模型再把结果平均
用一个同时被训练去预测条件 eps_cond 和无条件 eps_uncond 的模型，再以 eps = eps_uncond + w*(eps_cond - eps_uncond) 组合，从而放大对 prompt 的遵循
测试时给模型加一个分类器头
用一个更大的 scheduler
questions.explanation: CFG trains a single model with the conditioning dropped 10% of the time so the same weights produce both cond and uncond predictions. At inference the formula above amplifies the conditional direction. Guidance scale w is the standard knob to tune prompt adherence vs diversity; SD defaults to 7.5.
questions.explanation_zh: CFG 训练单个模型，并以约 10% 的概率丢掉条件，让同一组权重既能输出有条件预测也能输出无条件预测。推理时上面的公式会放大条件方向。guidance scale w 是调节「贴合 prompt」和「多样性」之间的标准旋钮，SD 默认是 7.5。

questions.question: You swap SD's default scheduler for DPM-Solver++ 2M Karras and reduce num_inference_steps from 50 to 20. What is the expected result?
questions.question_zh: 把 SD 的默认 scheduler 换成 DPM-Solver++ 2M Karras，再把 num_inference_steps 从 50 降到 20，预期结果是什么？
options: Worse quality and longer runtime
Comparable quality in roughly half the time; DPM-Solver++ is a second-order ODE integrator that converges in fewer steps than DDIM for the same sample quality
Numerical instability
You must also retrain the model
options_zh: 质量变差、耗时变长
质量相当，时间约缩短一半；DPM-Solver++ 是二阶 ODE 积分器，在达到同等样本质量时需要的步数比 DDIM 更少
数值不稳定
还必须重新训练模型
questions.explanation: Schedulers are decoupled from the model weights. DPM-Solver++ is a higher-order solver that achieves DDIM-50 quality in about 20 steps. Zero retraining required, and it is the production default in 2026. Going below 8 steps typically needs distilled/consistency-model variants like LCM or Turbo.
questions.explanation_zh: scheduler 与模型权重是解耦的。DPM-Solver++ 是更高阶的求解器，约 20 步就能达到 DDIM-50 的质量。完全不用重训，2026 年这是生产环境的默认选择。要降到 8 步以下，通常得依赖 LCM、Turbo 这类蒸馏 / consistency model 变体。

questions.question: Why is LoRA fine-tuning popular for Stable Diffusion instead of full fine-tuning?
questions.question_zh: 为什么 Stable Diffusion 上流行 LoRA 微调而不是全参数微调？
options: LoRA produces better images by default

LoRA keeps the 860M base U-Net frozen and inserts tiny rank-decomposition matrices into attention layers, so a fine-tune trains in minutes on consumer hardware, produces 10-50 MB adapters, and can be swapped or mixed at inference
LoRA is required by diffusers
LoRA prevents overfitting entirely
options_zh: LoRA 默认就出图更好
LoRA 保持 860M 的 base U-Net 冻结，只在 attention 层插入很小的低秩分解矩阵，所以一次微调在消费级显卡上几分钟搞定，得到 10-50 MB 的 adapter，推理时还能换或者混用
diffusers 强制要求 LoRA
LoRA 能完全防止过拟合
questions.explanation: LoRA's value is training cost and distribution. Full SD fine-tuning updates 860M+ parameters and needs 20+ GB of VRAM. LoRA updates ~1-10M parameters and fits in 6-8 GB. The base model is unchanged, so the same LoRA loads into any compatible checkpoint, and multiple LoRAs can be combined. CivitAI's ecosystem is entirely LoRAs.
questions.explanation_zh: LoRA 的价值在于训练成本和分发。SD 全参数微调要更新 860M+ 参数、占 20+ GB 显存；LoRA 只更新约 1-10M 参数，6-8 GB 就够。base 模型不动，同一个 LoRA 能加载到任何兼容 checkpoint，多个 LoRA 还能组合。CivitAI 上的生态基本都是 LoRA。

questions.question: You generate the same prompt with guidance_scale=15 and see oversaturated colours and burned-in artefacts. What is going on?
questions.question_zh: 对同一个 prompt 设置 guidance_scale=15，结果颜色过饱、还有「烧焦」式的伪影，发生了什么？
options: The model is broken

CFG amplifies the conditional direction; past a threshold around 9-12 the amplification pushes predictions outside the manifold the VAE can decode cleanly, producing visual artefacts. Drop guidance to 7-9 for balanced results
The VAE needs retraining
The seed is wrong
options_zh: 模型坏了
CFG 放大了条件方向；当 w 超过 9-12 左右的阈值后，会把预测推到 VAE 能干净解码的流形之外，于是出现视觉伪影。把 guidance 降到 7-9 就能得到更平衡的结果
VAE 需要重新训练
seed 错了
questions.explanation: CFG's formula is unbounded: higher w moves the prediction further along (eps_cond - eps_uncond). Past a point, you leave the trained distribution and the VAE decoder produces over-saturated, posterised images. Production default is 7-8. Some newer schedulers support CFG scheduling (lower w at final timesteps) to avoid this.
questions.explanation_zh: CFG 公式没有上界：w 越大，预测沿 (eps_cond - eps_uncond) 方向走得越远。一旦超过某个点，就会偏离训练分布，VAE 解码出来就是过饱和、像海报化的图。生产默认值是 7-8。一些新 scheduler 支持 CFG 调度（在末段降低 w）来避免这种问题。
